evals.prompt: Set up OpenTelemetry tracing for a test suite that will emit spans to a collector endpoint
expected_patterns: globalTeardown OR global teardown OR teardown hook
anti_patterns: hardcoded trace endpoint without env variable

evals.prompt: Write a trace-based assertion that verifies a request hits specific services in order and includes latency checks
Implement the error categorization workflow: analyze production errors and identify which ones are uncovered by tests
anti_patterns: treating all errors as same priority

evals.prompt: Create a test from a production error: a null reference on POST /api/orders when user has no shipping address
expected_patterns: Sentry OR error tracker OR production error
missing shipping address OR address is null
describe OR it( OR unit OR integration OR e2e
anti_patterns: test that only checks response.ok() without error structure
no reference to the production error source

evals.prompt: Build a telemetry-driven test prioritization scoring function that ranks endpoints by frequency, error rate, and test coverage
expected_patterns: formula OR calculation with multiplication OR division

evals.prompt: Set up a trace assertion helper that validates distributed trace structure across microservices with expected spans in order
anti_patterns: only checking presence of one span

evals.prompt: Create an end-to-end diagnosis workflow: given a trace ID from a failing test, walk the span tree and identify the root cause
expected_patterns: Get the trace ID OR trace ID
Open the trace OR APM tool OR query by trace
Root span OR parent span OR parentSpanId
Child spans OR which services were called
Error spans OR span status OR status.*code
Correlate with logs OR Filter logs by trace ID
anti_patterns: assuming error is in first span without walking tree
no mention of APM tool or trace query

evals.prompt: Write a script to analyze hot paths: extract top endpoints by request volume and identify coverage gaps for each service boundary
expected_patterns: trace the code path OR through services
Gap: OR low test coverage OR zero or low
anti_patterns: checking only endpoint-level coverage without service breakdown

evals.prompt: Pin OpenTelemetry semantic conventions version and explain why version bumps are breaking for trace assertions
expected_patterns: save-exact OR exact version OR no caret OR 1.41
breaking changes OR attribute names drift
trace assertions written against attribute names

evals.prompt: Establish a production-error-to-test feedback loop for your team: weekly error review with assigned owners and tests created before incident close
expected_patterns: assign an owner OR assigned an owner OR owner
create a test OR test gap
postmortem OR What test would have prevented
known/acceptable OR mark as known OR marked acceptable
anti_patterns: error tracker ignored OR growing unresolved errors
tests created separately from incident resolution
